extraction.one_line_summary: SOLER Marc attacked solo from breakaway on categorized climbs, overcame 51-second deficit after bridging, won Stage 5 into Bilbao.
tactical_patterns: SOLER Marc bridged 51 seconds after breakaway established, showing UAE freed him from Movistar domestique constraints.
Breakaway establishment took excessive time, signaling GC teams anticipated stage breakaway-friendly despite finish climb.
MOLARD Rudy took red jersey from breakaway despite UAE presence, suggesting JUMBO-VISMA tolerates calculated jersey responsibility to rivals.
Alto de Bilbao finishing climb (4.6km at 8%) climbed twice but decided nothing, revealing gradient insufficient for GC separation.

rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: all-or-nothing rider with extreme form variance, but when on can bridge significant gaps solo on categorized climbs
rider_signals.MOLARD Rudy: positive: took red jersey from breakaway, only 2 seconds ahead of WRIGHT Fred suggests team may prioritize stage hunting over jersey defense
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: relinquished red jersey to breakaway without contest, JUMBO-VISMA showing willingness to shed early race leadership burden
rider_signals.HAYTER Ethan: neutral: maintained white jersey and third overall without incident, first GC mountain test produced no weakness signals
rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: positive: repeatedly dropped on climbs but fought back to breakaway for second place, diesel durability over explosive climbing
